## Flotsam Monorepo Makefile — delegates to component Makefiles
## Usage: make <target>

# Load .env if present — makes vars available to shell commands in recipes
-include .env

.PHONY: api-build api-run api-generate api-test api-test-unit api-test-tdd \
        api-lint api-migrate-up api-migrate-down api-clean \
        web-install web-dev web-build web-lint web-clean web-test web-test-tdd web-schema-sync \
        lint \
        dev dev-db-up dev-db-down \
        test-quick test-standard test-full \
        help

## api-build: Build all API binaries (flotsamd, flotsam-worker, flotsam)
api-build:
	$(MAKE) -C api build

## api-run: Run the API server (flotsamd)
api-run:
	$(MAKE) -C api run

## api-run-worker: Run the job worker (flotsam-worker --watch)
api-run-worker:
	$(MAKE) -C api run-worker

## api-generate: Run GraphQL code generation
api-generate:
	$(MAKE) -C api generate

## api-test: Run all API tests
api-test:
	$(MAKE) -C api test

## api-test-unit: Run API unit tests
api-test-unit:
	$(MAKE) -C api test-unit

## api-test-tdd: Run API tests with tdd-guard-go when installed
api-test-tdd:
	$(MAKE) -C api test-tdd

## api-lint: Run linter on the API
api-lint:
	$(MAKE) -C api lint

## api-migrate-up: Apply database migrations
api-migrate-up:
	$(MAKE) -C api migrate-up

## api-migrate-down: Roll back last database migration
api-migrate-down:
	$(MAKE) -C api migrate-down

## api-seed: Populate dev database with sample data
api-seed:
	$(MAKE) -C api seed

## api-dev-token: Mint a dev JWT for local testing
api-dev-token:
	$(MAKE) -C api dev-token

## api-clean: Remove API build artifacts
api-clean:
	$(MAKE) -C api clean

## web-install: Install web frontend dependencies
web-install:
	$(MAKE) -C web install

## web-dev: Start Vite dev server (port 8080, proxies /graphql → :8081)
web-dev:
	$(MAKE) -C web dev

## web-build: Type-check and build web frontend for production
web-build:
	$(MAKE) -C web build

## web-lint: Run ESLint on web frontend
web-lint:
	$(MAKE) -C web lint

## web-clean: Remove web build artifacts and node_modules
web-clean:
	$(MAKE) -C web clean

## web-test: Run web unit tests
web-test:
	$(MAKE) -C web test

## web-test-tdd: Run web tests with TDD Guard reporter when configured
web-test-tdd:
	$(MAKE) -C web test-tdd

## web-schema-sync: Regenerate web/schema.graphql and graphql-env.d.ts from API SDL files
web-schema-sync:
	cat api/graph/schema/*.graphql > web/schema.graphql
	cd web && pnpm exec gql-tada generate-output --tsconfig tsconfig.app.json

## lint: Run all linters (Go + web)
lint: api-lint web-lint

## dev: Start full-stack dev environment (Docker PG + air + Vite) with hot reload
dev:
	bash scripts/dev.sh

## dev-db-up: Start standalone dev database (PG 16 + pgvector + MinIO on port 5433)
dev-db-up:
	docker compose -f compose/db.yml up -d --wait
	@echo ""
	@echo "Dev database starting on port 5433. Use:"
	@echo "  DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/flotsam?sslmode=disable"
	@echo ""
	@echo "MinIO console: http://localhost:9001 (minioadmin/minioadmin)"

## dev-db-down: Stop and remove the standalone dev database container
dev-db-down:
	docker compose -f compose/db.yml down

## test-quick: Fast checks — Go unit tests, TS type-check + build, ESLint (~10-20s, no DB)
test-quick: api-test-unit web-build web-lint

## test-standard: Full local validation — quick + web unit tests + Go lint (~30-60s, no DB)
test-standard: test-quick web-test api-lint

## test-full: Complete validation — standard + integration tests (requires DB + running services)
test-full: test-standard api-test

## help: List all available targets
help:
	@echo ""
	@echo "Usage: make <target>"
	@echo ""
	@grep -hE '^## [a-z]' $(MAKEFILE_LIST) | sed 's/## //' | sort -t: -k1,1 | \
		while IFS=: read -r target desc; do \
			printf "  %-24s %s\n" "$$target" "$$desc"; \
		done

file.content:
# Flotsam

Personal knowledge management system — a "second brain" for capturing thoughts,
notes, URLs, and voice dictations, with semantic search and AI integration via MCP.

## What it does

- **Capture**: Save bookmarks (Chrome extension), voice notes (Android app),
  text notes, and files with minimal friction
- **Search**: Full-text and semantic (vector) search across everything you've saved
- **AI integration**: MCP server lets AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor) search,
  browse, and capture items in your knowledge base (JWT-authenticated)
- **Self-hosted**: You own your data end-to-end, deployed on your VPS

## Architecture

```
Clients (Chrome Extension, Android App, Web App, AI Tools via MCP)
  │
  ▼
Go API Server (GraphQL + REST upload + MCP)
  │
  ├── PostgreSQL + pgvector (metadata, embeddings, FTS, jobs)
  └── S3-Compatible Storage (page HTML, audio files, documents)
```

See [docs/specs/product-overview.md](docs/specs/product-overview.md) for the
full architecture document.

## Quick start

```bash
# Prerequisites: Go 1.24+, Node.js 22+, pnpm 9+, Docker

cp .env.example .env          # Edit with your settings
make dev                      # Start everything (DB + API + web)
```

| Service | URL |
|---------|-----|
| Web app | http://localhost:8080 |
| API | http://localhost:8081 |
| GraphQL Playground | http://localhost:8081/playground |
| MinIO Console | http://localhost:9001 |

## Development

```bash
make help                     # List all available targets
make dev-db-up                # Start dev database only
make api-build                # Build API binary
make api-test                 # Run Go tests
make web-install              # Install frontend dependencies
make web-dev                  # Start frontend dev server
make test-quick               # Fast checks (no DB required)
make test-standard            # Full local validation
```

## Project structure

```
flotsam/
├── api/                     # Go API server
│   ├── cmd/server/          # Entrypoint
│   ├── internal/            # Business logic packages
│   ├── graph/               # GraphQL (gqlgen)
│   └── migrations/          # SQL migrations (goose)
├── web/                     # React/TypeScript frontend
├── extension/               # Chrome extension (Manifest V3)
├── mobile/                  # Android app
├── compose/                 # Docker Compose files
├── docs/specs/              # Product & architecture specs
└── scripts/                 # Shell utilities
```

## Tech stack

| Component | Technology |
|-----------|-----------|
| API | Go + chi/v5 |
| GraphQL | gqlgen (schema-first) |
| Database | PostgreSQL 16 + pgvector |
| Background jobs | River (PG-backed) |
| Object storage | S3-compatible (MinIO dev / R2 prod) |
| Frontend | React 18 + TypeScript + Vite + Mantine 7 |
| GraphQL client | urql + gql.tada |

## Issue tracking

This project uses [beads](https://github.com/bead-code/beads) for issue tracking:

```bash
bd list          # All open issues
bd ready         # Unblocked issues ready to work
bd show <id>     # Issue details
```

1→## Flotsam API Makefile
     2→## ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     3→## Usage: make <target>
     4→## Targets requiring DATABASE_URL: migrate-up, migrate-down, migrate-status, migrate-create
     5→
     6→MODULE      := github.com/ketang/flotsam/api
     7→VERSION     := $(shell git describe --tags --always --dirty 2>/dev/null || echo dev)
     8→BUILD_TIME  := $(shell date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
     9→LDFLAGS     := -ldflags "-X $(MODULE)/internal/version.Version=$(VERSION) \
    10→                          -X $(MODULE)/internal/version.BuildTime=$(BUILD_TIME)"
    11→
    12→GOLANGCI_LINT := $(shell which golangci-lint 2>/dev/null || echo $(shell go env GOPATH)/bin/golangci-lint)
    13→
    14→GOOSE_DRIVER  := postgres
    15→GOOSE_DBSTRING ?= $(DATABASE_URL)
    16→GOOSE_DIR     := migrations
    17→
    18→.PHONY: build run generate lint vet fmt tidy clean \
    19→        migrate-up migrate-down migrate-status migrate-create \
    20→        test test-unit test-tdd test-integration seed dev help
    21→
    22→## build: Compile all binaries (flotsamd, flotsam-worker, flotsam)
    23→build:
    24→	go build $(LDFLAGS) -o bin/flotsamd ./cmd/flotsamd
    25→	go build $(LDFLAGS) -o bin/flotsam-worker ./cmd/flotsam-worker
    26→	go build $(LDFLAGS) -o bin/flotsam ./cmd/flotsam
    27→
    28→## build-server: Compile flotsamd only
    29→build-server:
    30→	go build $(LDFLAGS) -o bin/flotsamd ./cmd/flotsamd
    31→
    32→## build-worker: Compile flotsam-worker only
    33→build-worker:
    34→	go build $(LDFLAGS) -o bin/flotsam-worker ./cmd/flotsam-worker
    35→
    36→## build-cli: Compile flotsam CLI only
    37→build-cli:
    38→	go build $(LDFLAGS) -o bin/flotsam ./cmd/flotsam
    39→
    40→## run: Run the API server directly (no build step)
    41→run:
    42→	go run $(LDFLAGS) ./cmd/flotsamd
    43→
    44→## run-worker: Run the job worker directly (continuous mode)
    45→run-worker:
    46→	go run $(LDFLAGS) ./cmd/flotsam-worker --watch
    47→
    48→## generate: Re-run gqlgen code generation
    49→generate:
    50→	go generate ./...
    51→
    52→## lint: Run go vet + golangci-lint (includes gosec security checks)
    53→lint:
    54→	go vet ./...
    55→	$(GOLANGCI_LINT) run ./...
    56→
    57→## vet: Run go vet
    58→vet:
    59→	go vet ./...
    60→
    61→## fmt: Format all Go source files
    62→fmt:
    63→	gofmt -w .
    64→
    65→## tidy: Tidy go.mod and go.sum
    66→tidy:
    67→	go mod tidy
    68→
    69→## clean: Remove build artifacts
    70→clean:
    71→	rm -rf bin/
    72→
    73→## migrate-up: Apply all pending database migrations
    74→migrate-up:
    75→	DATABASE_URL=$(GOOSE_DBSTRING) go run github.com/pressly/goose/v3/cmd/goose \
    76→		-dir $(GOOSE_DIR) $(GOOSE_DRIVER) "$(GOOSE_DBSTRING)" up
    77→
    78→## migrate-down: Roll back the most recent migration

## Flotsam API Makefile
## ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Usage: make <target>
## Targets requiring DATABASE_URL: migrate-up, migrate-down, migrate-status, migrate-create

MODULE      := github.com/ketang/flotsam/api
VERSION     := $(shell git describe --tags --always --dirty 2>/dev/null || echo dev)
BUILD_TIME  := $(shell date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
LDFLAGS     := -ldflags "-X $(MODULE)/internal/version.Version=$(VERSION) \
                          -X $(MODULE)/internal/version.BuildTime=$(BUILD_TIME)"

GOLANGCI_LINT := $(shell which golangci-lint 2>/dev/null || echo $(shell go env GOPATH)/bin/golangci-lint)

GOOSE_DRIVER  := postgres
GOOSE_DBSTRING ?= $(DATABASE_URL)
GOOSE_DIR     := migrations

.PHONY: build run generate lint vet fmt tidy clean \
        migrate-up migrate-down migrate-status migrate-create \
        test test-unit test-tdd test-integration seed dev help

## build: Compile all binaries (flotsamd, flotsam-worker, flotsam)
build:
	go build $(LDFLAGS) -o bin/flotsamd ./cmd/flotsamd
	go build $(LDFLAGS) -o bin/flotsam-worker ./cmd/flotsam-worker
	go build $(LDFLAGS) -o bin/flotsam ./cmd/flotsam

## build-server: Compile flotsamd only
build-server:
	go build $(LDFLAGS) -o bin/flotsamd ./cmd/flotsamd

## build-worker: Compile flotsam-worker only
build-worker:
	go build $(LDFLAGS) -o bin/flotsam-worker ./cmd/flotsam-worker

## build-cli: Compile flotsam CLI only
build-cli:
	go build $(LDFLAGS) -o bin/flotsam ./cmd/flotsam

## run: Run the API server directly (no build step)
run:
	go run $(LDFLAGS) ./cmd/flotsamd

## run-worker: Run the job worker directly (continuous mode)
run-worker:
	go run $(LDFLAGS) ./cmd/flotsam-worker --watch

## generate: Re-run gqlgen code generation
generate:
	go generate ./...

## lint: Run go vet + golangci-lint (includes gosec security checks)
lint:
	go vet ./...
	$(GOLANGCI_LINT) run ./...

## vet: Run go vet
vet:
	go vet ./...

## fmt: Format all Go source files
fmt:
	gofmt -w .

## tidy: Tidy go.mod and go.sum
tidy:
	go mod tidy

## clean: Remove build artifacts
clean:
	rm -rf bin/

## migrate-up: Apply all pending database migrations
migrate-up:
	DATABASE_URL=$(GOOSE_DBSTRING) go run github.com/pressly/goose/v3/cmd/goose \
		-dir $(GOOSE_DIR) $(GOOSE_DRIVER) "$(GOOSE_DBSTRING)" up

## migrate-down: Roll back the most recent migration
migrate-down:
	DATABASE_URL=$(GOOSE_DBSTRING) go run github.com/pressly/goose/v3/cmd/goose \
		-dir $(GOOSE_DIR) $(GOOSE_DRIVER) "$(GOOSE_DBSTRING)" down

## migrate-status: Show migration status
migrate-status:
	go run github.com/pressly/goose/v3/cmd/goose \
		-dir $(GOOSE_DIR) $(GOOSE_DRIVER) "$(GOOSE_DBSTRING)" status

## migrate-create NAME=<name>: Create a new migration file
migrate-create:
	go run github.com/pressly/goose/v3/cmd/goose \
		-dir $(GOOSE_DIR) $(GOOSE_DRIVER) "$(GOOSE_DBSTRING)" create $(NAME) sql

## test: Run all tests with race detector
test:
	go test -race ./...

## test-unit: Run unit tests only (short mode)
test-unit:
	go test -race -short ./...

## test-tdd: Run Go tests with tdd-guard-go when installed
test-tdd:
	if command -v tdd-guard-go >/dev/null 2>&1; then \
		go test -json ./... 2>&1 | tdd-guard-go -project-root "$$(pwd)"; \
	else \
		go test -json ./...; \
	fi

## test-integration: Run integration tests (requires DATABASE_URL)
test-integration:
	go test -race -run Integration ./...

## dev-token: Mint a dev JWT for local testing (requires ENV=development)
dev-token:
	go run ./cmd/devtoken

## seed: Populate database with sample data
seed:
	go run ./cmd/seed

## dev: Run with air hot-reload (requires: go install github.com/air-verse/air@latest)
dev:
	air

## help: List all available targets
help:
	@grep -E '^## ' Makefile | sed 's/## //' | column -t -s ':'

services:
  db:
    image: pgvector/pgvector:pg16
    container_name: flotsam-dev-db
    ports:
      - "5433:5432"
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres
      POSTGRES_DB: flotsam
    volumes:
      - flotsam-dev-db-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres -d flotsam"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 3s
      retries: 10

  minio:
    image: minio/minio:latest
    container_name: flotsam-dev-minio
    ports:
      - "9000:9000"
      - "9001:9001"
    environment:
      MINIO_ROOT_USER: minioadmin
      MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD: minioadmin
    command: server /data --console-address ":9001"
    volumes:
      - flotsam-dev-minio-data:/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "mc", "ready", "local"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 3s
      retries: 10

volumes:
  flotsam-dev-db-data:
  flotsam-dev-minio-data:

# ─── Flotsam — Environment Variables ──────────────────────────────────────────
# Copy this file to .env and fill in real values.
# NEVER commit .env to version control.

# ─── Server ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
HOST=0.0.0.0
PORT=8081

# ─── Database ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# PostgreSQL connection string (pgx format)
# Required — server will not start without this.
DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/flotsam?sslmode=disable

# ─── Authentication (JWT) ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# HS256 shared secret — used for signing/verifying JWTs
JWT_SECRET=change-me-to-a-long-random-secret
# Token validity duration (Go duration format)
JWT_EXPIRY=24h

# ─── S3-Compatible Object Storage ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# Development: MinIO in Docker (see compose/db.yml)
# Production: Cloudflare R2 or AWS S3
S3_ENDPOINT=http://localhost:9000
S3_BUCKET=flotsam-dev
S3_ACCESS_KEY=minioadmin
S3_SECRET_KEY=minioadmin
S3_REGION=us-east-1
# Set to true for MinIO/local development
S3_FORCE_PATH_STYLE=true

# ─── AI Providers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# OpenAI — used for embeddings, transcription, classification
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...

# Local AI (Ollama) — used for sensitive content processing
# OLLAMA_URL=http://localhost:11434
# OLLAMA_EMBEDDING_MODEL=nomic-embed-text
# OLLAMA_CLASSIFICATION_MODEL=llama3.2

# ─── Embeddings ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Embedding model for semantic search (default: text-embedding-3-small, 1536 dims)
EMBEDDING_MODEL=text-embedding-3-small

# ─── Transcription (Whisper) ────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Cloud transcription model (requires OPENAI_API_KEY above)
WHISPER_MODEL=whisper-1
# Local whisper.cpp — used for sensitive items (optional)
# WHISPER_LOCAL_BIN=/usr/local/bin/whisper
# WHISPER_LOCAL_MODEL=/models/ggml-base.bin

# ─── Uploads ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Maximum upload size in bytes (default: 50MB)
MAX_UPLOAD_SIZE=52428800

# ─── Logging ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
LOG_LEVEL=info          # trace | debug | info | warn | error
LOG_FORMAT=text         # json (default/prod) | text (dev)

# ─── Environment ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ENV=development         # development | staging | production

# ─── CORS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Comma-separated allowed origins (empty = no CORS headers set)
CORS_ORIGINS=http://localhost:8080

# ─── GraphQL ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
GRAPHQL_PLAYGROUND=true     # Enable Playground UI (dev only — disable in prod)
GRAPHQL_INTROSPECTION=true  # Enable schema introspection

# ─── MCP (Model Context Protocol) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
MCP_ENABLED=true               # Enable MCP server endpoint at /mcp

# ─── Rate Limiting ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
RATE_LIMIT_ENABLED=true            # Master switch for all rate limits
RATE_LIMIT_GRAPHQL=60              # /graphql requests per minute (anonymous)
RATE_LIMIT_GRAPHQL_AUTH=120        # /graphql requests per minute (authenticated)
RATE_LIMIT_MCP=120                 # /mcp/* requests per minute (per user)

# ─── Shutdown ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
SHUTDOWN_TIMEOUT=15s

# ─── Frontend (Vite) ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:8081  # Override API URL for frontend (default: proxy)

# flt-it8.28: Dev Bootstrap Repair

## Context
`make dev` is the documented one-command bootstrap path but it calls `bash scripts/dev.sh` which doesn't exist. Individual targets (`make dev-db-up`, `make api-run`, `make web-dev`) work fine — the orchestration script is the missing piece. Additionally, README.md's project structure section has stale directory names.

## Plan

### 1. Create `scripts/dev.sh`
Orchestration script that:
- Starts Docker services (`docker compose -f compose/db.yml up -d --wait`)
- Waits for DB health, runs migrations (`make -C api migrate-up`)
- Ensures web deps are installed (`cd web && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`)
- Starts API server with hot reload if `air` is available, else `go run` (`make -C api dev` or `make -C api run`)
- Starts Vite dev server (`make -C web dev`)
- Both run as background processes with proper cleanup on SIGINT/SIGTERM (trap)
- Prints service URLs on startup

### 2. Fix README.md project structure
Current (wrong) → Correct:
- `cmd/server/` → `cmd/flotsamd/` (plus `cmd/flotsam-worker/`, `cmd/flotsam/`)
- `extension/` → `chrome-extension/`
- `mobile/` → `android/`
- `scripts/` description should mention dev.sh

### 3. Verify
- `make dev` no longer errors (at minimum: script exists, is executable, starts correctly)
- `make test-standard` passes (quality gate)

## Files to modify
- `scripts/dev.sh` — **create** (orchestration script)
- `Makefile` — no change needed (already calls `bash scripts/dev.sh`)
- `README.md` — fix project structure section

## Verification
```bash
# Script exists and is executable
test -x scripts/dev.sh

# Quality gate
make test-standard
```

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# scripts/dev.sh — Start the full-stack Flotsam dev environment.
# Usage: bash scripts/dev.sh   (or: make dev)
#
# Starts Docker services (PG + MinIO), runs migrations, then launches
# the API server and Vite dev server in parallel. Ctrl-C stops everything.

set -euo pipefail

ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")/.." && pwd)"
cd "$ROOT_DIR"

# ── Colours (disabled when not a terminal) ───────────────────────────────────
if [ -t 1 ]; then
  BOLD='\033[1m'  DIM='\033[2m'  RESET='\033[0m'
  GREEN='\033[32m'  CYAN='\033[36m'  YELLOW='\033[33m'
else
  BOLD=''  DIM=''  RESET=''  GREEN=''  CYAN=''  YELLOW=''
fi

info()  { echo -e "${GREEN}[dev]${RESET} $*"; }
warn()  { echo -e "${YELLOW}[dev]${RESET} $*"; }

# ── Cleanup on exit ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
PIDS=()
cleanup() {
  info "Shutting down…"
  for pid in "${PIDS[@]}"; do
    kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true
  done
  wait 2>/dev/null || true
  info "Done."
}
trap cleanup EXIT INT TERM

# ── 1. Start Docker services ────────────────────────────────────────────────
info "Starting Docker services (PG + MinIO)…"
docker compose -f compose/db.yml up -d --wait

# ── 2. Load .env if present ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
if [ -f .env ]; then
  set -a
  # shellcheck disable=SC1091
  source .env
  set +a
fi

# Default DATABASE_URL for the dev compose stack
export DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/flotsam?sslmode=disable}"

# ── 3. Run migrations ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
info "Running database migrations…"
make -C api migrate-up

# ── 4. Install web dependencies if needed ────────────────────────────────────
if [ ! -d web/node_modules ]; then
  info "Installing web dependencies…"
  (cd web && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile)
fi

# ── 5. Start API server ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
if command -v air >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  info "Starting API server with hot reload (air)…"
  (cd api && air) &
else
  info "Starting API server (go run — install air for hot reload)…"
  make -C api run &
fi
PIDS+=($!)

# ── 6. Start Vite dev server ────────────────────────────────────────────────
info "Starting Vite dev server…"
make -C web dev &
PIDS+=($!)

# ── 7. Print summary ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
echo ""
echo -e "${BOLD}Flotsam dev environment running:${RESET}"
echo -e "  ${CYAN}Web app${RESET}              http://localhost:8080"
echo -e "  ${CYAN}API${RESET}                  http://localhost:8081"
echo -e "  ${CYAN}GraphQL Playground${RESET}   http://localhost:8081/playground"
echo -e "  ${CYAN}MinIO Console${RESET}        http://localhost:9001"
echo ""
echo -e "${DIM}Press Ctrl-C to stop all services.${RESET}"
echo ""

# ── Wait for background processes ────────────────────────────────────────────
wait

# Flotsam

Personal knowledge management system — a "second brain" for capturing thoughts,
notes, URLs, and voice dictations, with semantic search and AI integration via MCP.

## What it does

- **Capture**: Save bookmarks (Chrome extension), voice notes (Android app),
  text notes, and files with minimal friction
- **Search**: Full-text and semantic (vector) search across everything you've saved
- **AI integration**: MCP server lets AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor) search,
  browse, and capture items in your knowledge base (JWT-authenticated)
- **Self-hosted**: You own your data end-to-end, deployed on your VPS

## Architecture

```
Clients (Chrome Extension, Android App, Web App, AI Tools via MCP)
  │
  ▼
Go API Server (GraphQL + REST upload + MCP)
  │
  ├── PostgreSQL + pgvector (metadata, embeddings, FTS, jobs)
  └── S3-Compatible Storage (page HTML, audio files, documents)
```

See [docs/specs/product-overview.md](docs/specs/product-overview.md) for the
full architecture document.

## Quick start

```bash
# Prerequisites: Go 1.24+, Node.js 22+, pnpm 9+, Docker

cp .env.example .env          # Edit with your settings
make dev                      # Start everything (DB + API + web)
```

| Service | URL |
|---------|-----|
| Web app | http://localhost:8080 |
| API | http://localhost:8081 |
| GraphQL Playground | http://localhost:8081/playground |
| MinIO Console | http://localhost:9001 |

## Development

```bash
make help                     # List all available targets
make dev-db-up                # Start dev database only
make api-build                # Build API binary
make api-test                 # Run Go tests
make web-install              # Install frontend dependencies
make web-dev                  # Start frontend dev server
make test-quick               # Fast checks (no DB required)
make test-standard            # Full local validation
```

## Project structure

```
flotsam/
├── api/                     # Go API server
│   ├── cmd/server/          # Entrypoint
│   ├── internal/            # Business logic packages
│   ├── graph/               # GraphQL (gqlgen)
│   └── migrations/          # SQL migrations (goose)
├── web/                     # React/TypeScript frontend
├── extension/               # Chrome extension (Manifest V3)
├── mobile/                  # Android app
├── compose/                 # Docker Compose files
├── docs/specs/              # Product & architecture specs
└── scripts/                 # Shell utilities
```

## Tech stack

| Component | Technology |
|-----------|-----------|
| API | Go + chi/v5 |
| GraphQL | gqlgen (schema-first) |
| Database | PostgreSQL 16 + pgvector |
| Background jobs | River (PG-backed) |
| Object storage | S3-compatible (MinIO dev / R2 prod) |
| Frontend | React 18 + TypeScript + Vite + Mantine 7 |
| GraphQL client | urql + gql.tada |

## Issue tracking

This project uses [beads](https://github.com/bead-code/beads) for issue tracking:

```bash
bd list          # All open issues
bd ready         # Unblocked issues ready to work
bd show <id>     # Issue details
```
